source_title: План дальнейших исследований для v11 — Forensic Audit Cycle
goal: Rigorously audit v10's claimed microstructure overlay success through reproduction, leakage checks, reference/window integrity, matched reruns, cannibalization analysis, and a final confirmed/downgraded/rejected verdict.
global_constraints: v11 is audit-only: no new features, no new directional scouts, no label changes, no early-cut experiments
Immutable baseline reference is active-signal-v1@1 — never modify or re-tune it
All comparisons must use the exact same window (train / selection-OOS / lockbox) for base and overlay
Lockbox window must never be used to select thresholds or labels
Short-only, long-only, and combined veto must be tested as separate independent runs — identical deltas require explanation
Rule-based overlay must be tested before model-backed overlay
No parameter adjustments during reproduction; record outcome as-is
PROMOTE status only after full forensic cycle passes

stages.title: Freeze и постановка forensic-cycle
stages.objective: Establish the v11 audit-only project, freeze immutable reference, and create structured open-items register for every audit block.
actions: Open a dedicated research_project for v11 audit cycle
Record in research_memory: v10 claimed success, reasons it needs forensic validation, specific red flags to check
Lock immutable reference: active-signal-v1@1, BTCUSDT, anchor 1h, execution 5m
Define research_map axes: audit_block, side, run_type, leakage_type, comparison_window, final_verdict

Create open-items register covering: reference_integrity, window_integrity, feature_leakage_audit, label_leakage_audit, snapshot_assembly_audit, reproduce_v10, same_window_base_runs, short_long_combined_separation, cannibalization_ownership, final_v11_verdict
success_criteria: Dedicated v11 audit project exists with frozen mode declaration
Immutable reference locked in research_memory
Research map axes defined
All ten open-items registered and tracked

stages.title: Exact reproduction of v10 from scratch
stages.objective: Reproduce the full v10 pipeline from scratch — dataset, micro-core features, baselines, veto models, overlay snapshot, and lockbox result — without any manual adjustments.
actions: Rebuild dataset and micro-core features from raw data
Recalculate bucket veto and threshold veto baselines
Rebuild best short and long veto models
Reassemble overlay snapshot
Repeat the reported lockbox result and compare against v10 claims
success_criteria: Verdict recorded: reproduced exactly, partially reproduced, or not reproduced
All reproduction metrics documented without post-hoc adjustments

stages.title: Reference integrity audit
stages.objective: Resolve the core contradiction: determine whether active-signal-v1@1 and active-signal-v1@3 are identical or materially different.
actions: Inspect and compare active-signal-v1@1 vs active-signal-v1@3 in detail
Check logic, parameters, execution rules, filters, exits, symbol and window coverage
If snapshots differ: declare v10 comparison invalid and rerun all v10 comparisons strictly against @1
success_criteria: Clear verdict: @1 == @3 or @1 != @3 documented with evidence
If mismatched, all affected comparisons flagged for rerun

stages.title: Window integrity audit
stages.objective: Verify that all v10 comparisons used identical train/selection-OOS/lockbox windows with no lookahead or threshold snooping.
actions: Lock and document exact windows for train, selection OOS, and lockbox
Verify thresholds were selected only on selection OOS, never on lockbox
Confirm lockbox was never used to choose thresholds or labels
Confirm same lockbox window was used for both base and overlay runs
Check window consistency across short, long, and combined variants
success_criteria: Window discipline verdict: valid or invalid, with per-window evidence

stages.title: Feature leakage audit
stages.objective: Verify that all micro-features are causally clean with no future information leaking into decision-time features.
actions: For each micro-feature: audit source timeframe, aggregation cutoff, 5m-to-1h alignment causality, warmup/null handling, dataset materialization alignment
Deep focus on cf_micro_imbalance_1h, cf_micro_close_pressure_1h, cf_micro_shock_cluster_1h
Shift test: shift feature by +/-1 bar and check if suspiciously good results persist
Null-mask sanity: check if presence/absence of feature is itself a hidden signal
Timestamp audit: manually verify several decision timestamps
success_criteria: Per-feature verdict: leakage absent, suspicious, or confirmed leakage
All three priority features individually cleared or flagged

stages.title: Label leakage and shortcut audit
stages.objective: Determine whether the suspiciously high veto model AUC/PR (~0.95) is explained by label-feature near-identity rather than genuine signal.
actions: Inspect construction of bad_trade_pnl_balanced, fragile_trade_mae_balanced, bad_trade_composite_balanced labels
Measure direct association between label membership and cf_micro_imbalance_1h values
Check for near-direct threshold shortcut between label definition and strongest feature
Run ablation: model with only cf_micro_imbalance_1h
Run ablation: model without cf_micro_imbalance_1h
Run ablation: model with shuffled labels
Run ablation: model with shuffled feature
success_criteria: Label verdict: labels valid, labels too shortcut-prone, or labels invalid
Ablation results documented showing marginal contribution of key feature

stages.title: Snapshot assembly audit
stages.objective: Verify that the veto overlay snapshot assembly preserves causal order and does not retroactively block already-opened trades.
actions: Inspect overlay snapshot logic in detail
Audit when veto decision is computed relative to trade entry
Check which feature value is available at decision moment
Verify no retroactive blocking of already-opened trades
Check for mixed logic contamination between long and short veto paths
Separately audit short-only, long-only, and combined snapshot variants
success_criteria: Per-variant causal verdict: decision_timing_ok, causal_blocking_ok, side_isolation_ok, mixed_logic_absent

stages.title: Same-window matched reruns
stages.objective: Run immutable base and all overlay variants on the exact same lockbox window to produce an unambiguous head-to-head comparison.
actions: Run immutable base active-signal-v1@1 on lockbox window
Run short-only veto overlay over base on same lockbox window
Run long-only veto overlay over base on same lockbox window
Run combined veto overlay over base on same lockbox window
For each run compute: trades, net PnL, PF, max DD, win rate, removed trades, removed winners
success_criteria: Complete matched same-window comparison table with all four routes
All runs use identical lockbox window with no ambiguity

stages.title: Cannibalization and ownership audit
stages.objective: Prove that overlay improvement comes from genuinely removing bad trades — not from hidden interaction with base mechanics or coverage loss.
actions: For each route (short-only, long-only, combined): list removed trades, their PnL, share of removed losers vs winners, which side benefits most
Check weak-window repair effect
Check regime-specific loss of good coverage
Verify overlay does not kill strong profitable clusters
Compute ownership attribution: improvement from removing bad trades vs hidden base interaction
success_criteria: Honest ownership and cannibalization verdict per route
Quantified share of removed losers vs winners with coverage-loss risk assessment

stages.title: Negative controls and robustness
stages.objective: Test whether the v10 result is robust to perturbations or collapses under slight changes to thresholds, time slices, or side assignments.
actions: Placebo thresholds: slightly worse, slightly better, and opposite-side threshold
Small perturbation test: threshold +/- small epsilon
Time-slice robustness: first half vs second half of lockbox separately
Side-perturbation: apply long threshold to short side and vice versa
success_criteria: Robustness verdict per test: stable or fragile
Clear determination if result depends on a single accidental threshold value

stages.title: Финальный вердикт по v11
stages.objective: Synthesize all audit evidence into a final forensic verdict on the v10 microstructure overlay: CONFIRMED, DOWNGRADED TO WATCHLIST, or REJECTED.
actions: Aggregate evidence from all previous stages into structured verdict

Classify outcome: CONFIRMED (reproducible, no leakage, real improvement), DOWNGRADED TO WATCHLIST (signal alive but fragile or methodologically weak), or REJECTED (leakage found, non-reproducible, or improvement disappears)
Record final verdict in research_memory
Update research_map with final_verdict axis status
success_criteria: Final forensic verdict recorded with supporting evidence from every audit block
Verdict is one of: CONFIRMED, DOWNGRADED TO WATCHLIST, REJECTED
All open-items from stage_1 resolved

warnings: v10 lockbox table used active-signal-v1@3 as baseline while reference should be @1 — must be resolved first
v10 veto models report AUC/PR ~0.95 which is suspiciously high and may indicate label-feature shortcut
